title: AI memory • campaign
summary: A comprehensive launch campaign package for HAIROTICMEN premium men's grooming brand in Germany, leveraging existing product data and images, targeting style-conscious men aged 25-45. The campaign focuses on brand awareness, product education, and conversion through a phased multi-channel approach, despite current asset and documentation gaps.

value.command: Build a Germany launch campaign for HAIROTICMEN using the current brand brain, product CSV, and product images. Return campaign_package.
recommendations: Prioritize completion and approval of brand guidelines to ensure consistent brand messaging.
Develop and finalize pricing and offer documents to enable clear promotional communication.
Secure legal documents to ensure compliance with German advertising and product regulations.
Produce high-quality product videos to enhance engagement and product understanding.
Create social media and campaign assets aligned with brand guidelines for cohesive visuals.

title: AI memory • executive
summary: Based on the current product CSV data and available product images, five HAIROTICMEN products have been identified as optimal first-campaign candidates in Germany. These selections consider product appeal, market fit, visual readiness, and strategic positioning to maximize initial campaign impact despite existing asset and documentation gaps.

value.command: Recommend the top 5 HAIROTICMEN products to push in Germany based on the current product CSV and available product images. Include why each product is a good first-campaign candidate.
recommendations: Prioritize finalizing and approving the brand guideline to ensure consistent campaign messaging.
Develop and approve pricing and legal documentation to enable compliant marketing and sales operations.
Produce product videos to enhance engagement and demonstrate product benefits effectively.
Create social media and campaign assets leveraging the strong product images available.
Expand social insight coverage by syncing all social channels to optimize content formats and publishing schedules.
